sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52097" key="ka/kisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάκ-ισις</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n52097.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blame</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐν τοῖς διαπραττομένοις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:182:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">182.20</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
